message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings across benches and tests (29 files)

Fixes: mul_add, semicolon_if_nothing_returned, unnecessary_cast,
float_cmp, manual_find, redundant_closure, explicit_iter_loop,
wildcard_imports, if_same_then_else, manual_range_contains,
needless_range_loop, needless_collect, similar_names, io_other_error,
large_futures, unnecessary_get_then_check, unused imports/mut,
manual_checked_ops, suboptimal_flops, missing CompatRuntime imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
